display.purpose: Chakra Petch for page titles and angular instrument headings.

title.purpose: In-panel section titles; often uppercase accent.

body.purpose: IBM Plex Sans for guidance, descriptions, and field values.

label.purpose: Uppercase micro labels, badges, and control chrome (11px / 0.6875rem).

mono.purpose: IBM Plex Mono for hashes, IDs, and operator detail.

label-xs.purpose: Dense instrument chrome — ghost buttons, filter chips (10px / 0.625rem).

shadows.name: hotspot-float
shadows.purpose: Portaled InfoHotspot popovers only; resting plates stay flat.

motion.name: pulse-line
motion.purpose: Rare functional progress shimmer; not decorative attention.

components.name: Accent Button
components.description: Primary readiness action — badge wash, uppercase instrument type.
components.css: .ds-btn-accent { font-family: var(--font-display), sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 8px 12px; color: var(--accent, #e8b86d); border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, #e8b86d) 45%, transparent); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, #e8b86d) 12%, transparent); cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-accent:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-accent:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid var(--accent, #e8b86d); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-accent:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Default button — square seam border, accent on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { font-family: var(--font-display), sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 8px 12px; color: var(--foreground, #d9dee8); background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--line, #232b3a); cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { border-color: var(--accent, #e8b86d); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid var(--accent, #e8b86d); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-emphasis control for back-to-library and quiet actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { font-family: var(--font-display), sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 4px 8px; color: var(--muted, #8b94a7); background: transparent; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: var(--foreground, #d9dee8); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid var(--accent, #e8b86d); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { font-family: var(--font-display), sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 8px 12px; color: var(--danger, #e2654f); background: transparent; border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--danger, #e2654f) 40%, transparent); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--danger, #e2654f) 10%, transparent); } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid var(--danger, #e2654f); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Notched Panel
components.html:
Identity

Designated synergies define this build. Variants may swap kits.
components.css: .ds-panel { background: var(--surface, #11151d); border: 1px solid var(--line, #232b3a); padding: 16px; color: var(--foreground, #d9dee8); clip-path: polygon(12px 0, 100% 0, 100% calc(100% - 12px), calc(100% - 12px) 100%, 0 100%, 0 12px); } .ds-panel-label { font-family: var(--font-display), sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted, #8b94a7); margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-panel-body { font-family: var(--font-body), sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.45; margin: 0; color: var(--foreground, #d9dee8); }

components.name: Raised Panel
components.description: Nested/raised plate for popovers and denser nested chrome.
components.html:
Coverage

Soft guidance — weak on non-default variants.
components.css: .ds-panel-raised { background: var(--surface-raised, #161b25); border: 1px solid var(--line, #232b3a); padding: 16px; color: var(--foreground, #d9dee8); clip-path: polygon(12px 0, 100% 0, 100% calc(100% - 12px), calc(100% - 12px) 100%, 0 100%, 0 12px); } .ds-panel-label { font-family: var(--font-display), sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted, #8b94a7); margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-panel-body { font-family: var(--font-body), sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.45; margin: 0; }

components.name: Filter Chip Include
components.description: Include-mode filter — amber wash, instrument uppercase.
components.css: .ds-filter-include { font-family: var(--font-display), sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 4px 8px; color: var(--accent, #e8b86d); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, #e8b86d) 10%, transparent); border: 1px solid var(--accent, #e8b86d); cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease, background 0.15s ease; } .ds-filter-include:hover { opacity: 0.92; } .ds-filter-include:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid var(--accent, #e8b86d); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Filter Chip Exclude
components.description: Exclude-mode filter — danger tone with line-through.
components.css: .ds-filter-exclude { font-family: var(--font-display), sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 4px 8px; color: var(--danger, #e2654f); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--danger, #e2654f) 10%, transparent); border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--danger, #e2654f) 60%, transparent); text-decoration: line-through; text-decoration-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--danger, #e2654f) 80%, transparent); cursor: pointer; } .ds-filter-exclude:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid var(--danger, #e2654f); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Meta Chip
components.description: Read-only dense meta tag; may carry element accent on border/text.
components.css: .ds-meta-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-family: var(--font-body), sans-serif; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 2px 8px; border: 1px solid var(--line, #232b3a); color: var(--muted, #8b94a7); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-meta-swatch { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 0; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Square instrument status/readiness badge with wash fills. React: Badge (tone verified|accent|fuzzy|warning|unresolved|illegal|danger). warning→fuzzy CSS, danger→illegal CSS.
components.html: Exotic Verified Fuzzy Illegal
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: var(--font-display), sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 2px 6px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0; line-height: 1.2; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge-verified { color: var(--success, #6fc28b); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--success, #6fc28b) 12%, transparent); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--success, #6fc28b) 45%, transparent); } .ds-badge-accent { color: var(--accent, #e8b86d); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, #e8b86d) 12%, transparent); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, #e8b86d) 45%, transparent); } .ds-badge-fuzzy { color: var(--warning, #d9a93f); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--warning, #d9a93f) 12%, transparent); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--warning, #d9a93f) 45%, transparent); } .ds-badge-unresolved { color: var(--muted, #8b94a7); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--muted, #8b94a7) 12%, transparent); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--muted, #8b94a7) 45%, transparent); } .ds-badge-illegal { color: var(--danger, #e2654f); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--danger, #e2654f) 12%, transparent); border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--danger, #e2654f) 45%, transparent); }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Raised-plate field with muted micro label.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; width: 100%; } .ds-field-label { font-family: var(--font-body), sans-serif; font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted, #8b94a7); } .ds-field-input { width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; background: var(--surface-raised, #161b25); border: 1px solid var(--line, #232b3a); padding: 6px 8px; font-family: var(--font-body), sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: var(--foreground, #d9dee8); border-radius: 0; } .ds-field-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent, #e8b86d); } .ds-field-input:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid var(--accent, #e8b86d); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Info Hotspot Popover
components.description: Portaled entity detail — raised notch, optional accent pin border.
components.html:
Verb
Ionic Traces

Creates traces on final blows with Arc abilities.
components.css: .ds-hotspot { min-width: 240px; max-width: 300px; padding: 10px; background: var(--surface-raised, #161b25); border: 1px solid var(--accent, #e8b86d); color: var(--foreground, #d9dee8); clip-path: polygon(12px 0, 100% 0, 100% calc(100% - 12px), calc(100% - 12px) 100%, 0 100%, 0 12px); box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.35), 0 8px 10px -6px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.35); } .ds-hotspot-kind { font-family: var(--font-body), sans-serif; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted, #8b94a7); margin-bottom: 2px; } .ds-hotspot-title { font-family: var(--font-body), sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-hotspot-line { font-family: var(--font-body), sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.4; margin: 0; color: var(--muted, #8b94a7); }

narrative.overview:
The product UI is a quiet after-action kit desk: spare, precise, and instrument-grade, lit like a vault console after the fireteam is already home. Surfaces are angular notched plates on deep charcoal; type is tight and uppercase where it marks controls; chips and entity icons carry density so the player can scan gear truth without hunting chrome.

The mood leans richer Destiny fan-UI than a sterile ops dashboard: soft ambient vault glows in the page background, amber readiness accents, and permission to use elemental color as atmospheric glow and section ornament—not only as strict data labels. Ornament still serves readiness and identity (exotic, element, class, coverage), never carnival noise. Depth stays tonal and flat-by-default; shadows are rare and functional (e.g. portaled hotspots), not card float.

Hard anti-references: light-mode SaaS pastel dashboards; DIM pixel-clone as a design goal; rounded friendly-consumer blobs and thick universal drop shadows; generic AI purple-gradient hero aesthetics.
keyCharacteristics: Dark vault field with dual radial atmosphere and notched plate surfaces
Single product accent (amber) for readiness/selection; status greens/reds/ambers for system state
Destiny element palette for real damage-type data and restrained decorative glow
Chakra Petch display + IBM Plex Sans body + IBM Plex Mono for operator detail
Viewport-locked shell: dual-pane Workspace/Catalog, independent scroll regions
Icon-first entity language (ItemIcon, designation glyphs, filter icons)
Compose via Vault Terminal primitives (src/components/ui) — no one-off panel chrome

rules.name: The One Amber Rule
rules.body: Product accent amber is the only non-status brand accent. It marks readiness, selection, and primary action—not every heading and border.

rules.name: The Element Truth Rule
rules.body: Element hexes always remain correct for real damage-type data. Decorative elemental glow is allowed but must not recolor neutral chrome or impersonate selection amber.

rules.name: The Badge Wash Rule
rules.body: Status and accent badges use low-opacity fills (~10–12%) plus mid-opacity borders (~45%) via color-mix—never solid candy blocks.

rules.name: The Uppercase Instrument Rule
rules.body: Interactive chrome (buttons, filter chips, badges, section labels) defaults to uppercase + wide tracking. Long-form guidance and descriptions stay sentence case in Plex Sans.

rules.name: The Display Restraint Rule
rules.body: Chakra Petch is for titles, labels, and badges—not long paragraphs.

rules.name: The Viewport Lock Rule
rules.body: Do not let page content expand document height. Scroll inside panes (overflow-y-auto overscroll-contain), not the body.

rules.name: The Focus Swap Rule
rules.body: On narrow viewports, library and detail never fight for half a phone—one owns the column; back control returns to library.

rules.name: The Flat Plate Rule
rules.body: Surfaces stay flat; elevation is a darker/lighter plate or a border tone shift, not a universal drop shadow.

rules.name: The Portal Escape Rule
rules.body: Anything that must overlay notched panels (hotspots, menus) portals to document.body so clip-path cannot crop it.

rules.name: The Notch Signature Rule
rules.body: Primary containers use the notched plate. Do not replace it with generic rounded cards on production surfaces.

rules.name: The No Soft Blob Rule
rules.body: Avoid large border-radius consumer app shapes and pill-everything patterns on core chrome (pills only if a specific control already establishes them).

dos: Do compose production screens from src/components/ui primitives (Panel, Workspace, Button, FilterChip, Badge, Text/Heading, hotspots) instead of raw panel-notch one-offs.
Do keep the page viewport-locked; put scroll on rails, mains, and lists.
Do use amber for selection/readiness and status colors for system truth; use element colors on real sandbox typing and restrained atmospheric tint.
Do prefer official item/designation/filter icons and icon-dense chips for scanability.
Do portal overlays that must escape notched clip-paths.
Do preserve square instrument chrome and the 12px opposite-corner notch on primary plates.
donts: Don't introduce light-mode SaaS layouts, soft pastel cards, or airy white dashboards as the default product skin.
Don't treat pixel-perfect DIM clone as a design goal (parity of information is fine; chrome is Vault Terminal).
Don't round everything into friendly consumer pills or bury plates in thick universal drop shadows.
Don't ship generic AI purple-gradient heroes or decorative glassmorphism as brand identity.
Don't spray amber or elemental color across every border until selection and damage-type truth stop reading.
Don't let long Chakra display paragraphs replace Plex body for guidance copy.
Don't auto-animate attention (beyond rare functional pulses like progress) in a way that fights Silent Fireteam calm.
